zh.lifeSummary: 當John Beaufort 1st Duke of Somerset and Earl of Kendal於1404年3月25日出生在英國米德萊可雙維其肯哈姆時，他的父親John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset31歲，母親Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence18歲。他於1441年8月2日之後與Baroness Margaret Beauchamp Duchess of Somerset結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1444年5月27日在英國多瑟特維波內 明斯特享年40歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特維波內 明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Beaufort 1st Duke of Somerset and Earl of Kendal于1404年3月25日出生在英国米德萊可雙維其肯哈姆时，他的父亲John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset31岁，母亲Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence18岁。他于1441年8月2日之后与Baroness Margaret Beauchamp Duchess of Somerset结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1444年5月27日在英国多瑟特維波內 明斯特享年40岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特維波內 明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Beaufort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Beaufort . The surname Beauford is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Beaufort 1st Duke of Somerset and Earl of Kendal was born on 25 March 1404, in Twickenham, Middlesex, England, his father, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, was 31 and his mother, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, was 18. He married Baroness Margaret Beauchamp Duchess of Somerset after 2 August 1441. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 27 May 1444, in Wimborne Minster, Dorset, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Wimborne Minster, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Beaufort 1st Duke of Somerset and Earl of Kendal est né le 25 mars 1404, à Twickenham, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Margaret Beauchamp Duchess of Somerset après 2 août 1441. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1444, à Wimborne Minster, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Wimborne Minster, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als John Beaufort 1st Duke of Somerset and Earl of Kendal am 25. März 1404 in Twickenham, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset 31 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence 18. Er hat nach 2. August 1441 Baroness Margaret Beauchamp Duchess of Somerset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Mai 1444 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Wimborne Minster, Dorset, England und wurde in Wimborne Minster, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Beaufort 1st Duke of Somerset and Earl of Kendal è nato il il 25 marzo 1404 nel Twickenham, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Margaret Beauchamp Duchess of Somerset dopo il 2 agosto 1441. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 27 maggio 1444, nel Wimborne Minster, Dorset, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Wimborne Minster, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Beaufort 1st Duke of Somerset and Earl of Kendalが1404年3月25日にイギリスミッドレセックストウィクエンハムで生まれた時，父John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somersetは31歳，母Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarenceは18歳であった。1441年8月2日以後にBaroness Margaret Beauchamp Duchess of Somersetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1444年5月27日にイギリスドールセトウィンボルン ミンスターで40歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトウィンボルン ミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: 영국 미들레세스 플레신크트 프 스트 캐더이인
ko.lifeSummary: John Beaufort 1st Duke of Somerset and Earl of Kendal(이)가 1404년 3월 25일 영국 미들레세스 트윅함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1441년 8월 2일 이후 Baroness Margaret Beauchamp Duchess of Somerset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1444년 5월 27일 영국 도르세트 위본 민스터에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 위본 민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.25 March 1404–27 May 1444: 25 de março de 1404–27 de maio de 1444
pt.Upholland, Lancashire, England: Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Beaufort 1st Duke of Somerset and Earl of Kendal nasceu em 25 de março de 1404, em Twickenham, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Margaret Beauchamp Duchess of Somerset após 2 de agosto de 1441. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de maio de 1444, em Wimborne Minster, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Wimborne Minster, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: пресинкт оф ст катираин, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Beaufort 1st Duke of Somerset and Earl of Kendal родился 25 марта 1404 г. в местности твиккенам, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Margaret Beauchamp Duchess of Somerset после 2 августа 1441 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 27 мая 1444 г. в местности вимборн минстир, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности вимборн минстир, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Beaufort 1st Duke of Somerset and Earl of Kendal nació el 25 de marzo de 1404, en Twickenham, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Baroness Margaret Beauchamp Duchess of Somerset después de 2 de agosto de 1441. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 27 de mayo de 1444, en Wimborne Minster, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Wimborne Minster, Dorset, Inglaterra.
